subcodes.first_line: What thou hast written is understood. In reply I will elucidate briefly, the purport of which you, with your intelligence, will surely comprehend.
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون جهان انسانی را ظلمات بيگانگی و تفرقه و اختلاف و اجتناب و بغض و عداوت و جهل
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
